action.proof_term:
intro n hn H h2520
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 2) ≤ 4 := by
    have hsub : n - 2 < n := by omega
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by
      refine ⟨2 * n, ?_⟩
      rintro y ⟨x, rfl⟩
      dsimp [f]
      rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
      have hc := Nat.card_divisors_le_self (x : ℕ)
      have hx : (x : ℕ) < n := x.isLt
      omega
    let m : Fin n := ⟨n - 2, hsub⟩
    have hm : f m ≤ n + 2 := le_trans (le_ciSup hbdd m) H
    dsimp [f, m] at hm
    omega
  rcases h2520 with ⟨q, hq⟩
  have hdiv : 2 ∣ n - 2 := by
    apply Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero.mpr
    omega
  let r : ℕ := (n - 2) / 2
  have hcancel := Nat.div_mul_cancel hdiv
  have hr : n - 2 = 2 * r := by
    dsimp [r]
    omega
  change Nat.Prime r
  have hr2 : 2 ≤ r := by omega
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime 2 r := by
    refine Nat.coprime_of_dvd ?_
    intro p hp hp2
    intro hpr
    have peq : p = 2 := (Nat.prime_dvd_prime_iff_eq hp (by norm_num)).mp hp2
    subst p
    rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at hpr
    omega
  have hfixed : 2 ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 2 := by
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    have hs : ({1, 2} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ (2 : ℕ).divisors := by
      intro x hx
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
      rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
      constructor
      · rcases hx with rfl | rfl <;> norm_num
      · norm_num
    norm_num at hs ⊢
    exact Finset.card_le_card hs
  have comp : ¬ Nat.Prime r → 3 ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r := by
    intro hnp
    rcases (Nat.not_prime_iff_exists_dvd_ne hr2).mp hnp with ⟨d, hd, hd1, hdr⟩
    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    have hs : ({1, d, r} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ r.divisors := by
      intro x hx
      simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx
      rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
      constructor
      · rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl
        · exact one_dvd r
        · exact hd
        · exact dvd_rfl
      · omega
    have h1d : 1 ≠ d := Ne.symm hd1
    have h1r : 1 ≠ r := by omega
    have hcard : ({1, d, r} : Finset ℕ).card = 3 := by
      simp [h1d, hd1, hdr, h1r]
    calc
      3 = ({1, d, r} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm
      _ ≤ r.divisors.card := Finset.card_le_card hs
  by_contra hprime
  have hcomp := comp hprime
  have hmul : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2 * r) =
      ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 2 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r :=
    ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop
  have hprod : 6 ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 2 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r := by
    calc
      6 = 2 * 3 := by norm_num
      _ ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 2 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r :=
        Nat.mul_le_mul hfixed hcomp
  have hlarge : 6 ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2 * r) := by
    rw [hmul]
    exact hprod
  rw [hr] at shift
  omega

intro n hn H h2520
  have shift : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - 2) ≤ 4 := by
    have hsub : n - 2 < n := by omega
    let f : Fin n → ℕ := fun x => (x : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 x
    have hbdd : BddAbove (Set.range f) := by

    rw [ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply]
    have hs : ({1, d, r} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ r.divisors := by

      rw [Nat.mem_divisors]
      constructor
      · rcases hx with rfl | rfl | rfl
        · exact one_dvd r
        · exact hd
        · exact dvd_rfl
      · omega
    have h1d : 1 ≠ d := Ne.symm hd1
    have h1r : 1 ≠ r := by omega
    have hcard : ({1, d, r} : Finset ℕ).card = 3 := by

    calc
      3 = ({1, d, r} : Finset ℕ).card := hcard.symm
      _ ≤ r.divisors.card := Finset.card_le_card hs
  by_contra hprime
  have hcomp := comp hprime
  have hmul : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2 * r) =
      ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 2 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r :=
    ArithmeticFunction.isMultiplicative_sigma.map_mul_of_coprime hcop
  have hprod : 6 ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 2 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r := by
    calc
      6 = 2 * 3 := by norm_num
      _ ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 2 * ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 r :=
        Nat.mul_le_mul hfixed hcomp
  have hlarge : 6 ≤ ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (2 * r) := by
    rw [hmul]
    exact hprod
  rw [hr] at shift
  omega

info.lean_statement: ∀ n : ℕ, 84 < n → (⨆ m : Fin n, (m : ℕ) + ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 m) ≤ n + 2 → 2520 ∣ n → Nat.Prime ((n - 2) / 2)

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
